verdict.note: Real headless Chromium (snap chromium + playwright-core) against worktree vite :5217 + own spex serve :8917. 8/8 DOM checks pass: rail 5 svg buttons w/ title+aria; issues .fv-new-btn = plus svg, no text, title=aria=New; modal .legend-close = x svg w/ close label; fold svg.fold-toggle-icon present; session pills plus+magnifier svgs w/ titles; annotator .an-play play svg + .an-ab-nav chevron svgs both labeled; no unicode ＋×⏸▶‹› left in converted buttons. Montage: rail/new/pills/modal/ab/play.

note: evidence image was a broken composite (nested file:// embeds failed to load — 6 placeholder frames, icons not visible); refiling with a direct full-page screenshot

verdict.note: REFILE with real evidence (prior reading retracted: composite embed produced placeholder frames). Direct full-page Chromium shot of #/evals annotator showing the shared icons LIVE: rail 5 svg glyphs (left edge), master-list fold panel-left icon (top of list col), A/B ‹ › chevron IconButtons (header right, beside pips), play triangle in .an-play + center bigplay ring, corner-bracket fullscreen in .an-bar. Same run DOM checks 8/8: fv-new-btn=plus svg title/aria=New (blob 3b23bc00…), modal .legend-close=x svg (blob a7845427…), session pills plus+magnifier (blob a4f568a5…); no unicode ＋×⏸▶‹› left in converted buttons.

Real dashboard after adding the check glyph (chevron-down added then removed in the redesign): console pills (.si-pill new/search) and issues .fv-new-btn all render <svg> with aria-labels, no unicode glyph text; side rail shows 5 SVG page glyphs. Icon vocabulary intact.

Real-browser measurement (Playwright headless Chromium) against a 4-launcher test project: launcher pop-out shows 4 .si-launcher-row each with a distinct svg.si-agent-glyph (claude spark vb24 / codex ring vb160 / opencode squares vb240x300 / pi mark vb45); no glyph shared between rows, so no claude-fallback for opencode/pi; legible in light and dark themes.

Re-measured after the vendor-mark rework (stroke registry untouched, verified live): headless Chromium on the worktree dashboard — issues .fv-new-btn (svg, aria/tip New), modal .legend-close (svg x), session pills new/search (svg plus/magnifier), side rail 5 rail-btn all svg with aria-labels, annotator .an-ab-nav chevrons + .an-play play control all real SVGs; zero unicode glyph text in any measured control.

Every converted control renders a real stroke SVG with tooltip+aria: issues New (+, 'New'), modal close (×, 'close'), A/B walkers (chevrons with direction labels), player play control, the composer's new send arrow ('Send'), console New/Search pills, 5 side-rail glyphs; zero unicode ＋×⏸‹› button leftovers

Launcher pop-out shows 5 rows / 4 DISTINCT si-agent-glyph path signatures in BOTH themes — Claude spark, Codex ring, opencode squares, pi P-mark; claude-glm and reclaude legitimately share the Claude mark (both harness=claude); no wrong-harness fallback for opencode/pi

Re-measure after adding the 'projects' layers glyph to the vocabulary. Real Chromium :8930: all five rail glyphs are stroke SVGs; console ＋ pill, issues .fv-new-btn, legend close × all render <svg> (no unicode glyph text) with aria-label + tooltip. Annotator A/B/play controls not reachable in this rig (no open video eval) — their code untouched; the icons.jsx diff is a pure glyph ADD.

Real browser: issue-opened is the shared registry's 16px two-path filled Octicon; Issues New/modal close, Sessions New/Search, Evals A/B/play, and all five rail icons render SVG with matching data-tip/aria; no retired unicode button glyphs; 0 page errors.

Real New Session launcher picker: 5 rows, four distinct official product-mark path signatures (two Claude launchers intentionally share one), all inherit currentColor and remain legible in Rosé Pine Dawn + Dracula; 0 page errors.

YATU on committed fc699535: the running Issues page rendered the shared registry's official two-path 16px Primer lifecycle pair. All 44 open rows used issue-opened; all 47 github closed and 63 local landed rows used the same issue-closed SVG geometry and semantic closed color, with no CSS status dots or page errors. Existing shared icon controls remained rendered in the same live page and the production build passed.

Post-merge re-run (main added the filled Octicon issue glyphs; this branch the projects layers glyph): rail glyphs, console pills, issues New, legend close all SVG with aria+tooltip; no unicode glyph text. Annotator controls unreachable in this rig, code untouched.
